steps.title: Identify what Schomburg did with these people
steps.content: The relative clause "whom he asked to bring back rare and valuable objects from their international travels" explains the blank: Schomburg made requests of friends and colleagues and relied on them to deliver materials he could not get himself.

steps.title: Match the relationship to a verb phrase
steps.content: We need a phrase that conveys reliance on others to obtain something — not an attitude, opposition, or warning.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'admired': describes a feeling toward the friends, not the act of getting items through them — misread of the request relationship. ✗
  • Choice B — 'disagreed with': implies conflict, which contradicts the cooperative request described in the relative clause. ✗
  • Choice C — 'warned': would mean Schomburg cautioned them — nothing in the text suggests danger, and it doesn't explain how items were obtained. ✗
  • Choice D — 'depended on': captures the reliance — he counted on friends and colleagues to bring back rare items from abroad. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
